more.headline: Iran vows to completely block the Strait of Hormuz
Zelenskyy: Ukrainian forces struck 15 Russian oil refineries

tops.headline: Trump says "I don't care if negotiations with Iran are over" as Iran vows to block Hormuz

main.text: BREAKING: Trump: "I don't care if negotiations with Iran are over."

perspectives.text: IT'S OFFICIAL: The US military just launched MULTIPLE STRIKES against Iran... The mullahs are continuously screwing up. MAXIMUM PRESSURE is the only way.
perspectives.note: Direct from primary high-velocity account celebrating self-defense strikes and maximum pressure doctrine.

perspectives.text: BREAKING: Iran announces it is ending all negotiations with the US and vows to "completely" block the Strait of Hormuz, per CNBC.
perspectives.note: Highest-fidelity market + timeline signal. Minimal partisan overlay.

tops.note: Triangulated across high-velocity primary sources from all three sides. Bernie quote verbatim; Iran statement matches CNBC wire; conservative reaction sourced from the live thread, not a screenshot.

tops.headline: Iran vows to fully block Strait of Hormuz; Brent jumps 8%

main.text: BREAKING: Iran announces it will "completely" block the Strait of Hormuz, per CNBC.

perspectives.text: Brent crude up 8% in pre-market. If Hormuz actually closes, $120+ this week is in play.
perspectives.note: Market-data anchored take with concrete near-term forecast.

perspectives.text: Escalation in Hormuz means $5+ gas at the pump and another war we didn't ask Congress for. Diplomacy isn't optional.
perspectives.note: Anti-escalation Democrat framing — constitutional war-powers point is factually grounded; price prediction is opinion.

tops.headline: Zelenskyy: Ukrainian drones hit 15 Russian oil refineries overnight

main.text: Tonight Ukrainian forces struck 15 Russian oil refineries across 6 oblasts.

perspectives.text: Largest single-night drone strike of the war. Refineries provide ~40% of Russian gasoline.
perspectives.note: Verifiable scale claim with quantified market impact.

perspectives.text: OSINT confirms ~10 refinery hits; remaining 2-3 appear to be smaller fuel depots, not refineries.
perspectives.note: Independent OSINT verification with explicit numerical caveats.

more.headline: Historical deportation numbers show previous administrations removed millions

tops.headline: ICE operations at Delaney Hall face protests as authorities arrest violators

main.text: 🚨 LMFAO!! This THUG has been RUNNING HIS MOUTH after violating NJ curfew outside ICE... police just stormed up behind him and he was SWEPT AWAY in half a second 🤣 FAFO!

perspectives.text: This THUG has been RUNNING HIS MOUTH after violating NJ curfew outside ICE... police just stormed up behind him and he was SWEPT AWAY in half a second. FAFO!
perspectives.note: High engagement post celebrating swift enforcement against curfew violators and protesters.

perspectives.text: ICE agent standing guard at Delaney Hall sports a Hulk green Rolex Submariner over his “We The People” tattoo
perspectives.note: Viral visual post showing ICE presence.

tops.note: Reporting accurate on incident location and timeline; partisan framing differs sharply between sides. Independent perspective from local news is most fact-driven.

tops.headline: Trump signs order restoring federal control of D.C.

main.text: President Trump has signed an order restoring federal control over Washington, D.C.

perspectives.text: About time. Federal city, federal jurisdiction. The Constitution is clear on this.
perspectives.note: Constitutional framing is factually grounded; tone is editorial.

perspectives.text: Federal overreach into a city of 700,000 American taxpayers with no voting representation in Congress.
perspectives.note: Direct from D.C. mayor; disenfranchisement claim is factually accurate.

tops.headline: Historical deportation numbers go viral as immigration debate intensifies

main.text: Eisenhower: 1M+ deported. Obama: 3M+. Trump term 1: 1.5M. The policies aren't new.

perspectives.text: Raw numbers roughly check out; Obama's 3M figure includes border returns counted differently across administrations.
perspectives.note: Independent fact-check with methodology caveats spelled out.

perspectives.text: Citing past administrations doesn't justify current ICE tactics. Each policy stands on its own merits.
perspectives.note: Argument-shifting response; doesn't dispute the underlying numbers.

more.headline: Anthropic files for IPO, targets fall debut
Taiwan's market cap rises to $4.95 trillion, overtaking India

tops.headline: Stock Market Surpasses Dot-Com Bubble Valuation

main.text: JUST IN: Stock market reaches "most expensive" valuation ever — surpassing dot com bubble.

perspectives.text: JUST IN: Stock market reaches "most expensive" valuation ever — surpassing dot com bubble.
perspectives.note: Factual report of verifiable valuation metric reaching record.

perspectives.text: We've been 'most expensive ever' for 18 months. Doesn't mean a crash is imminent; means forward returns are likely lower.
perspectives.note: Veteran-trader pattern recognition; cautious but not catastrophist.

tops.note: Valuation data is accurate per cited source. Forward-looking commentary is opinion, not fact — different perspectives interpret the same number very differently.

tops.headline: Magnificent 7 hits $17T market cap — bigger than every market except the US

main.text: Magnificent 7 market cap now $17T — larger than every stock market in the world except the US itself.

perspectives.text: Productivity gains from AI are real and only just starting to hit earnings. We're early.
perspectives.note: Strong opinion grounded in earnings-margin trend; verifiable on margins.

perspectives.text: Concentration risk at peaks: 7 stocks ≈ 35% of S&P 500. Diversification is effectively dead.
perspectives.note: Concentration data is publicly verifiable; risk framing is conservative.

tops.headline: Bitcoin breaks $150K; ETF inflows hit weekly record

main.text: Bitcoin: $150,432. ETF inflows: $4.8B this week. Sovereign accumulation accelerating.

perspectives.text: Three nation-states announced strategic BTC reserves this month. This is now monetary policy, not retail FOMO.
perspectives.note: Two of three announcements verifiable; one is rumored only.

perspectives.text: Same FOMO at every cycle peak. Real money still has near-zero exposure for a reason.
perspectives.note: Predictable contrarian voice; framing is editorialized but reflects a real institutional gap.

elon.headline: It is this or death
elon.note: Strong opinion on justice and deterrence. High engagement on two-tier theme.

elon.headline: Legacy medias lies both by promoting false stories and by ignoring true ones
elon.text: Legacy medias lies both by promoting false stories and by ignoring true ones
elon.note: Direct call out on media omission of Henry Nowak case.

elon.headline: Send the video to everyone you know showing how heinously Nowak was treated
elon.text: Send the video to everyone you know showing how heinously Nowak was treated by the police in his dying moments and how the police cravenly kowtowed to his murderer. Legacy mainstream media... are dead silent about Nowak.
elon.note: Powerful on media double standard and two-tier society.

sports.headline: NBA Finals set: New York Knicks vs San Antonio Spurs
San Antonio Spurs headed to NBA Finals for first time since 2014
Stephon Castle's one-handed slam voted top dunk of Conference Finals

ifollow.justification: High velocity on enforcement and conservative takes; consistent primary sourcing on breaking events.
Best market/geopolitics velocity and factual breakdowns.
Strong America First framing with good engagement on policy.
Clear opposing Democrat perspective for balance.

free.headline: Marc Andreessen on free speech and innovation (always first)
free.text: Free speech is the foundation of progress. Without it, we regress.
free.note: Core principle post from a16z founder.

free.headline: Legacy media silent on certain stories while amplifying others
free.text: Send the video... Legacy mainstream media... are dead silent about Nowak.
free.note: Direct on media bias and suppression - strong free speech angle.

msm.headline: Henry Nowak stabbing: UK man stabbed 5 times, police filmed dying moments instead of helping, murderer got knife from mother

main.text: Send the video to everyone you know showing how heinously Nowak was treated by the police in his dying moments and how the police cravenly kowtowed to his murderer. Legacy mainstream media, same ones who wrote about George Floyd millions of times, are dead silent about Nowak.

perspectives.text: Send the video to everyone you know showing how heinously Nowak was treated by the police in his dying moments and how the police cravenly kowtowed to his murderer. Legacy mainstream media... are dead silent about Nowak.
perspectives.note: Direct call to action on media double standard. Highlights two-tier policing and coverage.

perspectives.text: Britain had a moment of silence for George Floyd... Henry Nowak *was* British and his treatment by the police was shocking... Yet there is no minute of silence... And we all know why.
perspectives.note: Strong analysis of racial hierarchy in victimhood and media/elite response.

perspectives.text: Did they show or even mention the Henry Nowak footage? Legacy Media… CNN: No MSNBC: No ABC News: No CBS News: No NBC News: No USA Today: No New York Times: No Washington Post: No
perspectives.note: Documented omission across all major outlets. X is the only place this is being amplified.
